name: BeatDrop Outfit Library Analysis
description: Generic analysis-only preset: rank a separate outfit library against video scene/pose references and choose one visibly different before/after pair without hard coverage gates.
text_query_scene_fit: full-body outfit candidate with framing, pose, silhouette and camera compatibility with the driving-video reference scene
text_query_change_target: clear visible outfit transformation with a different silhouette, cut, shape or styling while preserving full-body usability

0.query: before-drop outfit: complete full-body outfit with pose and framing compatible with the video reference
must: complete outfit visible head to toe
standing or pose-compatible full-body fashion image
clear clothing silhouette and garment shape
avoid: cropped image hiding most of the outfit
product-only image without a wearable outfit

1.query: after-drop outfit: complete full-body outfit with a strong visible change in silhouette, cut, shape or styling
must: complete outfit visible head to toe
standing or pose-compatible full-body fashion image
visibly different clothing silhouette, cut, shape or styling from the before-drop outfit
avoid: cropped image hiding most of the outfit
product-only image without a wearable outfit
